channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bentancur 'conscious' and taken to hospital after injury during Tottenham-Liverpool match
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Tottenham midfielder Rodrigo Bentancur was “conscious” after being carried off on a stretcher in the 14th minute of a match against Liverpool in the English League Cup semifinals on Wednesday after falling to the ground at a corner.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jason Kelce sounds off on Saquon Barkley sitting in final Eagles game, missing rushing record
item.description: Jason Kelce weighed in on whether he wanted to see Saquon Barkley get a chance to break the rushing record or if he should have rested with the Eagles' playoff seed locked up.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Clippers' Kawhi Leonard leaves team to help family deal with raging wildfires: report
item.description: Los Angeles Clippers star Kawhi Leonard will reportedly leave the team to tend to his family dealing with the wildfires raging across the city.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Claressa Shields and Danielle Perkins face-off ahead of heavyweight title fight
item.description: Claressa Shields and Danielle Perkins came face-to-face at an open media workout ahead of their bout for the undisputed heavyweight world championship which takes place on Feb. 2, at the Dort Financial Center in Flint, MI.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Hall, Local 4

item.title: Outdoor hockey is coming to Florida. The NHL will have games in Miami and Tampa next season
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Hockey. Outdoors. In Florida. Next season, the NHL is making it happen — twice. The NHL announced Wednesday that the Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers will play host to the New York Rangers at loanDepot Park in Miami — home of baseball’s Marlins — on Jan.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 49ers’ Shanahan spins his coordinator carousel, Lynch sums up 6-11 trainwreck
item.description: Coach Kyle Shanahan and general manager John Lynch huddled with the media Wednesday to review this season's 6-11 last-place finish and swift end to their NFC reign.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Penn State coach James Franklin calls for college football to have uniformity
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The Big Ten plays nine conference games in football. So does the Big 12. The Southeastern Conference and the Atlantic Coast Conference are among those playing eight-game league schedules. The Mountain West played a seven-game league slate. Notre Dame doesn't have a league.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big 12 basketball: After road sweep, Arizona’s outlook for a March Madness bid improves
item.description: The Wildcats started slowly this season but have won five in a row after beating Cincinnati and West Virginia.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Knicks visit conference foe Chicago Saturday
item.description: New York Knicks (24-11, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (15-19, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Knicks -5.5; over/under is 235.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago takes on New York in Eastern Conference action Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rams QB Matthew Stafford gets home inspected amid string of NFL home burglaries
item.description: A string of high-profile burglaries at the homes of NFL players that has even prompted a warning from the FBI has led one of the brightest stars of Los Angeles to take a proactive approach to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: With chance for 3rd straight win, Bulls fall on road to woeful Wizards, 125-107
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After winning two games in a row to close out 2024, the Bulls seemingly had a great opportunity to kick off 2025 with a third straight victory when they visited the nation's capital on Wednesday night to face the woeful Wizards. Things certainly didn't go as planned for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Derrick Rose to open pop-up flower shop in the Loop Thursday
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Former Chicago Bull and NBA MVP Derrick Rose is opening a pop-up flower shop for one day only in the Loop Thursday. According to a post on Rose's Instagram account, "Rose's Flower Shop" will be open from 12-4 p.m. at 350 North State Street.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
